summary: Faktur Indo backend: ran 21 pytest cases covering public health, Emergent OAuth gate (401 enforcement), business profile, clients CRUD, invoice numbering, invoice CRUD with PPN/total math, status transitions, auto-overdue, client snapshot, cross-tenant isolation (user_A vs user_B) and ObjectId leakage. ALL 21 PASSED (100%). Sessions were seeded directly into MongoDB (test_database.users + test_database.user_sessions) since real Google OAuth could not be driven.

minor.issue: Always returns {ok:true} even when the client does not exist or belongs to another user. Cross-tenant DELETE is correctly a no-op (filtered by user_id) but the response does not signal 404, which could mislead clients. Non-blocking.
Same as above — returns {ok:true} for non-existent / foreign invoices. No data leak, just inconsistent with PUT/PATCH which do return 404.

action_items: Optional: make DELETE /api/clients/{id} and DELETE /api/invoices/{id} return 404 when the resource does not exist for the calling user — matches PUT/PATCH behavior and helps client error handling.

Optional: tighten /api/invoices/next-number regex (right now it escapes '/' which works but the original code path had an f-string-with-backslash SyntaxError that was already fixed — leaving a note for awareness).
Frontend Google OAuth flow was not exercised (per instructions). Recommend a separate manual smoke once frontend is implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 472 lines — within budget, single file is acceptable for this MVP scope.
All DB calls are async (motor). All responses already strip _id via projection {'_id':0} — verified via test_no_objectid_leakage_in_any_response.
get_current_user correctly returns 401 (not 403) for missing/invalid/expired tokens — matches spec.
compute_totals is correctly invoked on both POST and PUT and rounds to 2 decimals.
Cross-tenant isolation is enforced by always filtering on user_id from the session — verified with two seeded users.
Auto-overdue logic in maybe_overdue() works on both single GET and list GET — verified.
Invoice numbering: regex escaping of '/' is functional but slightly over-escaped; output format matches INV/YYYY/MM/0001 spec and increments correctly.
Suggestion: extract Pydantic models and the auth dependency into separate modules (models.py, deps.py) before file grows past ~700 lines.
seed_data_creation: Inserted two test users (user_test123, user_testB456) + matching sessions (TEST_TOKEN_E2E, TEST_TOKEN_E2E_B) into MongoDB test_database. Per-test fixture cleans clients/invoices/business_profiles for both users; session-scope teardown removes the seeded users and sessions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_faktur_api.py is fully reusable. conftest.py seeds two users + tokens into MongoDB and cleans up. To re-run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env and MONGO_URL/DB_NAME from /app/backend/.env. Frontend Google OAuth has NOT been tested — driving the real OAuth flow requires a real Google account.
